items.title_en: Online age-verification tools for child safety are surveilling adults
items.title_zh: 面向儿童安全的线上年龄验证工具正在监控成年人
items.summary_en: Age-verification tools designed for child safety are collecting data on adults, creating surveillance for a broader audience. The piece argues for privacy-centric designs and stricter data governance to prevent abuse.
items.summary_zh: 为儿童安全而设计的在线年龄验证工具，正在对成年用户进行数据收集和监控，带来隐私风险。需要在设计和治理层面加强隐私保护，避免对成年人造成不必要的监控。

items.title_en: Yann LeCun's AI startup raises $1B in Europe's largest ever seed round
items.title_zh: Yann LeCun 的 AI 初创公司完成 10 亿美元种子轮
items.summary_en: LeCun's European AI startup raised $1B seed; Europe's largest seed round ever. This underscores investor confidence in foundational AI platforms and could accelerate Europe’s AI ecosystem across research, infrastructure, or hardware.
items.summary_zh: Yann LeCun 的 AI 初创公司完成 10 亿美元种子轮融资，成为欧洲有史以来规模最大的种子轮。此举凸显投资者对基础性 AI 架构的强劲兴趣，并可能推动欧洲在研发、基础设施或硬件方面的布局。

items.title_en: I put my whole life into a single database
items.title_zh: 将几乎人生放进一个数据库的个人故事，揭示隐私与数据控制的议题
items.summary_en: A personal story about consolidating nearly every aspect of life into one database and what that means for privacy, control, and data portability.
items.summary_zh: 将几乎人生放入一个数据库的个人故事，揭示隐私、控制权与数据可携带性等议题。

items.title_en: Hisense TVs add unskippable startup ads before live TV
items.title_zh: 海信电视在直播前加入不可跳过的开机广告
items.summary_en: Hisense Vidaa TVs reportedly add unskippable startup ads before live TV, raising concerns about user experience and platform governance. It touches on monetization and user control in smart TVs.
items.summary_zh: 海信 Vidaa 电视据称在直播前强制播放不可跳过的开机广告，引发对用户体验与平台治理的担忧，反映智能电视的盈利模式与用户控制问题。

items.title_en: Redox OS has adopted a Certificate of Origin policy and a strict no-LLM policy
items.title_zh: Redox OS 采纳证书来源政策并严格执行不得使用大语言模型
items.summary_en: Redox OS now requires a Certificate of Origin for contributions and bans any use of large language models in development or contributions. The change tightens provenance and governance, reflecting rising concerns about licensing, data usage, and IP in open-source projects. It may influence how other community-driven systems manage safety, licensing and contributor trust.
items.summary_zh: Redox OS 现在要求贡献者提供证书原产地证明，并执行严格的不得使用大语言模型的规定。此举强化了贡献链的可追溯性与治理，反映出开源项目中对许可、数据使用与知识产权的日益关注。此政策或影响其他以社区为驱动的系统在安全、许可与贡献信任方面的做法。

items.title_en: Intel Demos Chip to Compute with Encrypted Data
items.title_zh: 英特尔展示可对加密数据进行计算的芯片
items.summary_en: Intel demonstrated hardware that can perform computations on encrypted data using privacy-preserving techniques like Fully Homomorphic Encryption, enabling private cloud analytics without decrypting inputs. This signals progress toward practical privacy-preserving computing, though real-world adoption will hinge on performance, cost, and software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 英特尔展示了一款能够在不解密输入数据的情况下对其进行计算的芯片，使用全同态加密等技术实现隐私保护的云端计算。此举显示了面向隐私的计算在硬件层面的进展，未来要看性能、成本与生态。

items.title_en: Rebasing in Magit
items.title_zh: Magit 中的变基操作
items.summary_en: Magit's rebasing workflow makes it easy to perform interactive rebases from within Emacs, letting you squash, reword, or reorder commits without leaving the editor. It covers conflict resolution patterns and safe rebasing on feature branches using Magit's UI.
items.summary_zh: Magit 将变基工作流整合到 Emacs，允许在编辑器内进行交互式变基、合并提交、修改信息或重新排序提交，而无需切换工具。文章给出冲突处理的常见模式及在特性分支上安全变基的方法，提升上手速度和历史清晰度。

items.title_en: Germany's Solar Boom Eases Power Costs as Gas Price Jumps
items.title_zh: 德国太阳能激增缓解高燃气价格带来的电力成本上升
items.summary_en: Germany's solar boom eases electricity costs despite spikes in natural gas, illustrating renewables' buffering effect on energy bills and highlighting the need for grid and storage investments.
items.summary_zh: 德国的太阳能快速增长缓解了天然气价格上涨带来的电力成本上升，展示了可再生能源在抑制电费波动中的缓冲作用，同时也凸显对电网和储能投资的需求。

items.title_en: FreeBSD 14.4-Release Announcement
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 14.4 发行公告
items.summary_en: FreeBSD 14.4 finalizes the 14-series with updated drivers, kernel fixes, improved ZFS support, and security hardening. The release boosts stability for servers and desktops and includes backported enhancements.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 14.4 版本为 14 系列画上句点，带来更新的驱动、内核修复、ZFS 改进与安全强化。对服务器和桌面环境的稳定性和性能提升显著，适合生产环境升级。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Remember Fidonet?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你还记得 Fidonet 吗？
items.summary_en: An Ask HN thread exploring Fidonet, a pre-Internet, packet-switched network, inviting stories about its influence on early online communities and lessons for decentralized systems.
items.summary_zh: 讨论 Fidonet 的历史与影响，邀请读者分享关于早期在线社区的经验，以及对现代去中心化网络的启示。

items.title_en: Traffic from Russia to Cloudflare is 60% down from last year
items.title_zh: 来自俄罗斯的流量较去年下降 60%
items.summary_en: Cloudflare traffic from Russia dropped about 60% year over year, reflecting sanctions or shifts in user behavior. The data illustrates how geopolitical factors reshape global content delivery and attack surfaces.
items.summary_zh: 来自俄罗斯的 Cloudflare 流量同比下降约 60%，可能与制裁、用户行为变化相关。此数据揭示地缘政治因素对全球内容分发和攻击面格局的影响。

items.title_en: Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025)
items.title_zh: 爱尔兰关闭最后一座煤电厂，成为欧洲第15个无煤国家（2025）
items.summary_en: Ireland has closed its last coal-fired plant, reaching coal-free status and marking a milestone for Europe’s energy transition. The move accelerates renewables adoption and grid resilience challenges; it may influence Europe’s energy market and investment in storage and interconnectors.
items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰关闭最后一座煤电厂，正式实现全境无煤化，成为欧洲第15个无煤国家。此举加速可再生能源占比提升，同时对电网稳定、储能建设与区域互联提出新挑战与机遇。

items.title_en: No, it doesn't cost Anthropic $5k per Claude Code user
items.title_zh: 并非每个 Claude Code 用户都要花费 5k 美元
items.summary_en: Clarifies misconceptions about Claude Code's per-user cost and explains the cost structure behind running AI coding tools at scale, including caching, model usage, and hosting considerations.
items.summary_zh: 澄清关于 Claude Code 用户成本的误解，解释在大规模运行 AI 编码工具背后的成本结构，包括缓存、模型使用與托管等因素。

items.title_en: Two Years of Emacs Solo
items.title_zh: 两年独自打造的 Emacs：35 个模块、零外部包、全面重构
items.summary_en: Over two years, the author built a self-contained Emacs setup consisting of 35 modules with zero external packages, ending in a full refactor. It shows how far you can push a minimal dependency approach while trading off ecosystem compatibility, onboarding friction, and future-proofing.
items.summary_zh: 两年时间里，作者打造了一个完全自成体系的 Emacs 配置，包含 35 个模块且不依赖任何外部包，最终完成了全面重构。这个案例展示了极简依赖的可行性，以及在生态兼容性、上手难度与未来可维护性之间的取舍。

items.title_en: Building a Procedural Hex Map with Wave Function Collapse
items.title_zh: 用波函数坍缩生成六边形地图的程序化方法
items.summary_en: Using Wave Function Collapse to generate hex maps, this guide walks through tile constraints and edge matching for procedural world building. It also covers performance considerations and practical tips for integrating WFC into game tooling. The approach offers a reusable pattern for designers seeking deterministic, tweakable map generation.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示如何将波函数坍缩算法应用于六边形网格的程序化地图生成，讲解瓷砖约束与边界匹配的要点。内容还讨论了性能考量及将 WFC 集成到游戏工具链的实用技巧。此方法为追求确定性、可调地图的设计者提供了可复用的模板。

items.title_en: OpenAI is walking away from expanding its Stargate data center with Oracle
items.title_zh: OpenAI 正在放弃与 Oracle 扩展 Stargate 数据中心
items.summary_en: OpenAI has paused or reversed plans to expand the Stargate data center in collaboration with Oracle, signaling strategic shifts in cloud infra partnerships amid cost and scalability challenges. The move underscores the fragility of massive AI infra deals and hints at potential diversification of compute partners.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 已暂停或取消与 Oracle 的 Stargate 数据中心扩展计划，反映在成本与扩展性挑战下对云端基础设施伙伴关系的战略调整。此举凸显大规模 AI 基础设施投资的脆弱性，并可能促使计算资源伙伴的多元化。

items.title_en: Sending Jabber/XMPP Messages via HTTP
items.title_zh: 通过 HTTP 发送 Jabber/XMPP 消息
items.summary_en: A method to transport XMPP messages over HTTP creates a bridge between real-time chat protocols and web apps, enabling easier API-friendly communication or traversal around firewall rules. The write-up covers payload framing, authentication, and potential security pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 将 XMPP 消息通过 HTTP 传输，建立实时通信协议与 Web 应用的桥梁，便于穿透防火墙或实现网页端集成。文中讨论了载荷格式、认证与潜在的安全风险。

items.title_en: Florida judge rules red light camera tickets are unconstitutional
items.title_zh: 佛州法官裁定闯红灯摄像罚单违宪
items.summary_en: A Florida judge ruled red-light camera tickets unconstitutional, challenging the legality and due-process safeguards of automated enforcement. The decision could end fines in that jurisdiction and intensify national debate over whether cameras should govern traffic violations.
items.summary_zh: 佛州法官裁定闯红灯摄像罚单违宪，质疑自动执法的合法性与程序正义。该判决或在该辖区取消罚款，并促使就摄像执法的利弊展开更广泛讨论。

items.title_en: Is legal the same as legitimate: AI reimplementation and the erosion of copyleft
items.title_zh: 法律与正当性：AI 重现与 Copyleft 的侵蚀
items.summary_en: A discourse on when AI reimplementation crosses legal boundaries and how that affects copyleft norms.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在 AI 重现场景下，法律与正当性之间的界线，以及这对 copyleft 规范的影响。

items.title_en: Bluesky CEO Jay Graber is stepping down
items.title_zh: Bluesky CEO 杰伊·格雷伯将辞任
items.summary_en: Bluesky CEO Jay Graber is stepping down, signaling a leadership transition for the nascent decentralized social network. The move could reshape strategy, governance, and monetization as Bluesky scales and reaches more users.
items.summary_zh: Bluesky 首席执行官杰伊·格雷伯将辞任，标志着这家新兴去中心化社交网络的领导层过渡。此举可能影响 Bluesky 的战略、治理与商业化路径，随着规模扩张带来新方向。

items.title_en: LoGeR – 3D reconstruction from extremely long videos (DeepMind, UC Berkeley)
items.title_zh: LoGeR：极长视频的三维重建（DeepMind/UC Berkeley）
items.summary_en: LoGeR presents a pipeline for reconstructing 3D scenes from long-form videos, addressing scale, memory constraints, and temporal consistency. This enables more robust 3D modeling from continuous streams for research and media applications.
items.summary_zh: LoGeR 提出一套从极长视频中进行 3D 场景重建的工作流，解决规模、内存和时间一致性等挑战。该项目为持续视频流的鲁棒建模提供新思路，利于科研和多媒体应用。

items.title_en: Learnings from paying artists royalties for AI-generated art
items.title_zh: 从为AI生成艺术支付艺术家版税中得到的经验
items.summary_en: Paying royalties to artists for AI-generated art yields several practical takeaways: clear licensing terms matter, transparency in how royalties are calculated matters, and scalable tracking is hard. Royalties can help align incentives between creators and AI platforms, but they also complicate business models and compliance.
items.summary_zh: 向艺术家支付 AI 生成艺术的版税带来若干实际启示：明确许可、透明的计费方式与可扩展的追踪机制都很关键。版税有助于让创作者与 AI 平台的激励保持一致，但同时也会让商业模式与合规性变得更复杂。

items.title_en: SHOW HN: A usage circuit breaker for Cloudflare Workers
items.title_zh: SHOW HN：一个用于 Cloudflare Workers 的使用限流断路器
items.summary_en: A usage circuit breaker for Cloudflare Workers helps prevent runaway costs or abuse by tracking quotas and automatically shedding load. It demonstrates practical patterns for rate-limiting and reliability in edge computing.
items.summary_zh: 一个用于 Cloudflare Workers 的使用断路器，能通过配额跟踪和自动降载来防止成本飙升或滥用，展示了边缘计算中可操作的限流与可靠性模式。

items.title_en: JSLinux Now Supports x86_64
items.title_zh: JSLinux 现已支持 x86_64
items.summary_en: JSLinux, a JavaScript-based emulator, now supports running 64-bit x86 binaries in the browser. This broadens in-browser testing and exploration of Linux software without native executables, though performance will vary by workload.
items.summary_zh: 基于 JavaScript 的 JSLinux 现可在浏览器中运行 x86_64 二进制程序，免除本地环境即可测试和调试。虽然扩展了可用场景，但实际性能仍受限于浏览器与虚拟化实现。

items.title_en: Show HN: DD Photos – open-source photo album site generator (Go and SvelteKit)
items.title_zh: Show HN：DD Photos——一个用 Go 和 SvelteKit 构建的开源照片相册站点生成器
items.summary_en: DD Photos is an open-source photo album site generator built with Go and SvelteKit, focusing on easy deployment and privacy-friendly hosting. It provides templating, image handling, and a lightweight CMS for personal photo sites.
items.summary_zh: DD Photos 是一个用 Go 与 SvelteKit 构建的开源照片相册站点生成器，强调易部署和隐私友好托管。它提供模板、图片处理和轻量级 CMS，适合个人相册站点。

items.title_en: PgAdmin 4 9.13 with AI Assistant Panel
items.title_zh: PgAdmin 4 9.13：新增 AI 助手面板
items.summary_en: PgAdmin 4.9.13 adds an AI Assistant panel to help generate SQL, optimize queries, or suggest visualizations inside the query tool. It signals a broader trend of embedding AI copilots in developer IDEs and database tools to boost productivity.
items.summary_zh: PgAdmin 4.9.13 新增 AI 助手面板，帮助生成和优化 SQL，并可给出可视化建议。反映了开发工具嵌入 AI 助手的趋势，提升数据库工作流效率。

items.title_en: FontCrafter: Turn your handwriting into a real font
items.title_zh: Fontcrafter：把手写字转成真实字体
items.summary_en: Fontcrafter converts handwritten samples into usable font files, enabling rapid experimentation with personal typography. It showcases how easy it is to turn creative ideas into usable software assets, though licensing and quality caveats apply.
items.summary_zh: Fontcrafter 将手写笔迹转换成可用的字体文件，方便快速创建个性化字体或原型设计。它体现了从创意到可用软件资产的快速迭代，但需留意授权与质量等问题。

items.title_en: Windows: Microsoft broke the only thing that mattered
items.title_zh: Windows：微软把最关键的东西搞砸了
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that a Windows change ruined a core capability users rely on, underscoring how usability and reliability can trump novelty.
items.summary_zh: 尖锐观点认为 Windows 的某次改动破坏了用户最核心的功能，强调可用性与稳定性往往比新特性更重要。

items.title_en: Show HN: How I Topped the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard on Two Gaming GPUs
items.title_zh: Show HN：我如何用两块游戏 GPU 登顶 HuggingFace 开源 LLM 排行榜
items.summary_en: A hobbyist shows how to top HuggingFace’s open LLM leaderboard using only two consumer GPUs, sharing optimization tricks like quantization and efficient inference. It demonstrates that affordable hardware can achieve strong results with the right techniques.
items.summary_zh: 一位爱好者展示如何仅用两块游戏级 GPU 在 HuggingFace 的开源 LLM 榜单中取得领先，分享量化、推理优化等技巧，证明成本可观硬件在正确方法下也能产出强大性能。

items.title_en: DARPA’s new X-76
items.title_zh: DARPA 的新 X-76：快速、灵活的空中系统
items.summary_en: DARPA unveils X-76, a program targeting dramatically faster, more capable rotorcraft or vertical takeoff/landing systems, possibly combining jet-like speeds with helicopter flexibility. The project signals a push toward agile, mission-ready air systems that blend speed, range, and autonomy, with potential implications for defense and civilian aviation.
items.summary_zh: DARPA 公布 X-76 项目，旨在显著提升旋翼机在速度、机动性与任务适应性方面的能力，可能将喷气机级别的速度与直升机的垂直起降能力结合。该计划推动更快捷、具自主性的空中系统，或对防务与民用航空产生深远影响。

items.title_en: Fixfest is a global gathering of repairers, tinkerers, and activists
items.title_zh: Fixfest：全球修理者、动手者与行动者的聚会
items.summary_en: Fixfest gathers repairers, tinkerers, and activists to promote repairability and oppose throwaway culture. It highlights hands-on repair, policy advocacy, and community organizing around sustainable tech. The event signals growing mainstream momentum for repair-centric innovation.
items.summary_zh: Fixfest 汇聚修理者、动手爱好者与行动者，推动可修复性并抵制一次性文化。活动聚焦动手修复、政策倡导与社区组织在可持续科技中的作用。这一事件显示出以修复为核心的创新正在获得越来越多的主流支持。

items.title_en: The “JVG algorithm” only wins on tiny numbers
items.title_zh: JVG 算法只有在极小规模下才取胜
items.summary_en: Scott Aaronson argues that the JVG algorithm only outperforms alternatives for extremely small input sizes; its practical usefulness diminishes as scale grows. The piece cautions about trusting asymptotic gains and reminds readers to test algorithms in real regimes where they matter.
items.summary_zh: Scott Aaronson 指出，JVG 算法在极小规模时才具备优势，随着输入规模增大，其实际效能会迅速下降。该文提醒不要盲信渐近最优，而应在真实应用规模上检验算法表现。

items.title_en: Show HN: The Mog Programming Language
items.title_zh: Show HN：Mog 编程语言
items.summary_en: A new programming language called Mog is introduced, inviting discussion.
items.summary_zh: 一个名为 Mog 的新编程语言被介绍，邀请讨论。

items.title_en: So you want to write an “app” (2025)
items.title_zh: 你想写一个“应用”吗（2025）
items.summary_en: A candid look at building apps in 2025, outlining fragmentation, platform constraints, and the realities of shipping consumer software. It offers practical takeaways for independent developers navigating tooling, privacy, and revenue models.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年写一个“应用”的现实笔记，指出平台碎片化、合规与隐私等约束，以及将产品推向市场的现实挑战。为独立开发者提供在工具链、隐私与商业模式方面的可操作建议。

items.title_en: An opinionated take on how to do important research that matters
items.title_zh: 关于如何做重要、有意义研究的观点
items.summary_en: A sharp take on doing meaningful research, urging focus on impact, rigor, and actionable results.
items.summary_zh: 对如何进行有意义的研究给出尖锐观点，主张聚焦影响力、严格性以及可落地的结果。

items.title_en: Baochip-1x: A Mostly-Open, 22nm SoC for High Assurance Applications
items.title_zh: Baochip-1x：一个大部分开源的 22nm SoC，用于高可靠性应用
items.summary_en: Baochip-1x is a mostly-open 22nm SoC designed for high-assurance use cases, offering transparency and security features at a mature process node. It highlights open hardware trends and the trade-offs of modern manufacturing.
items.summary_zh: Baochip-1x 是一个大部分开源的 22nm SoC，面向高可靠性应用，强调透明度与安全特性。它体现了开源硬件的趋势以及在成熟工艺节点上的权衡。

items.title_en: Getting Started in Common Lisp
items.title_zh: Common Lisp 入门指南
items.summary_en: A beginner-friendly primer for Common Lisp, covering Lisp syntax, REPL-driven workflow, and small projects to build confidence.
items.summary_zh: 面向初学者的 Common Lisp 入门指南，涵盖 Lisp 语法、REPL 工作流与若干小型项目，帮助建立信心。

items.title_en: FFmpeg at Meta: Media Processing at Scale
items.title_zh: Meta 的 FFmpeg：大规模媒体处理
items.summary_en: Meta runs FFmpeg-based media processing at scale to handle vast video workloads, emphasizing encoding workflows, hardware acceleration, and streaming pipelines. The article shows how data pipelines, storage, and compute resources enable billions of daily video interactions.
items.summary_zh: Meta 在大规模视频处理场景中使用 FFmpeg，优化编码、硬件加速与流式处理管线。文章揭示了数据管线、存储与计算资源如何协同实现每日数十亿次视频交互。

items.title_en: Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol
items.title_zh: UniFi inform 协议的反向工程
items.summary_en: The post exposes how the UniFi inform protocol negotiates with devices, including message formats and basic authentication flows. Understanding this protocol can enable custom controllers and interoperability, while underscoring security considerations around proprietary protocols.
items.summary_zh: 反向工程暴露了 UniFi inform 协议在设备与控制器之间的消息交换、格式与认证流程。了解该协议有助于自建控制器和实现互操作性，同时提醒对专有协议在安全方面需要更多关注。

items.title_en: Show HN: DenchClaw – Local CRM on Top of OpenClaw
items.title_zh: DenchClaw：基于 OpenClaw 的本地 CRM
items.summary_en: DenchClaw stacks a local CRM on top of OpenClaw, emphasizing offline capability and data sovereignty. It demonstrates how open-source tools can enable private, on-premise customer management.
items.summary_zh: DenchClaw 将本地 CRM 架构叠加在 OpenClaw 之上，强调离线可用性与数据主权。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Terminal Use (YC W26) – Vercel for filesystem-based agents
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Terminal Use（YC W26）——用 Vercel 实现基于文件系统的代理
items.summary_en: Terminal Use demonstrates Vercel-based hosting for filesystem-backed agents, enabling persistent state and cloud-executed workflows. The project showcases how agents can operate with a virtual file system in the cloud, enabling reproducible experiments. It hints at broader potential for cloud-hosted agents with local-like capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Terminal Use 展示了使用 Vercel 托管基于文件系统的代理，支持持久化状态与云端执行的工作流。该项目演示了在云端环境中运行、维护近似本地工具链的能力，折射出向云端代理的趋势。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你们在做什么？（2026年3月）
items.summary_en: A regular Ask HN thread where engineers share their current projects. Contributions span AI tooling, systems work, indie startups, and academic research. It offers a snapshot of what tech workers are prioritizing mid-2026.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个常规的 Ask HN 讨论，工程师们分享自己正在做的项目。帖子覆盖 AI 工具、系统、独立创业和研究等领域，能从中读出 2026 年中科技界的关注焦点。

items.title_en: The first airplane fatality
items.title_zh: 托马斯·塞尔福里奇：首例飞机死亡事故
items.summary_en: Thomas Selfridge died in the first recorded airplane crash during a Wright brothers flight, highlighting the brutal risks of early aviation. The piece explains how the accident accelerated safety engineering, instrumentation, and testing culture that underpins modern flight.
items.summary_zh: 托马斯·塞尔福里奇在莱特兄弟的试飞中成为首例空难遇难者，揭示了早期航空的高风险。文章说明这一事故如何推动安全工程、仪表发展和测试文化的快速演进，为现代航空奠定基石。

items.title_en: I don't know Apple's endgame for the Fn/Globe key–or if Apple does
items.title_zh: 我不清楚苹果对 Fn/Globe 键的最终设计意图
items.summary_en: Speculation on Apple's elusive Fn/Globe key strategy and future keyboard semantics, suggesting Apple may be repurposing or de-emphasizing the keys for multilingual, accessibility, or new interface goals. The piece questions the long-term plan behind hardware controls as Apple shifts to newer input paradigms.
items.summary_zh: 关于苹果对 Fn/Globe 键策略及未来键盘语义的推测，暗示这些按键可能被重新定位、弱化或用于多语言、无障碍或新界面目标。讨论在苹果向新型输入范式转型时，硬件控制键的长期规划。

items.title_en: No leap second will be introduced at the end of June 2026
items.title_zh: 2026年6月底不再加入闰秒
items.summary_en: IANA announces no leap second will be added at end of June 2026, reducing disruption for timekeeping systems in some regions. The decision keeps clocks simple for now, but underscores long-standing questions about how best to synchronize global time.
items.summary_zh: IANA 宣布 2026 年 6 月底不再加入闰秒，减少部分时钟系统的干扰。此举让全球时间同步的难题再度成为讨论焦点，同时也意味着短期内的时间管理将更简单。

items.title_en: FreeBSD Capsicum vs. Linux Seccomp Process Sandboxing
items.title_zh: FreeBSD Capsicum 与 Linux Seccomp 的进程沙箱对比
items.summary_en: Capsicum uses capability-based sandboxing to restrict what a process can access, while Linux Seccomp relies on seccomp-bpf to filter system calls. The comparison highlights tradeoffs in model complexity, portability, and real-world integration for secure, low-overhead isolation.
items.summary_zh: Capsicum 基于能力的沙箱对进程访问进行最小化授权，而 Linux Seccomp 通过 seccomp-bpf 过滤系统调用。两者在模型复杂性、可移植性和实际集成方面各有取舍，决定了在安全性与性能之间的取舍。

items.title_en: Amazon holds engineering meeting following AI-related outages
items.title_zh: 亚马逊在 AI 故障后召开工程会议
items.summary_en: Details Amazon holding an engineering meeting after AI outages, signaling a move to bolster reliability, incident response, and post-mortem practices for AI-backed services.
items.summary_zh: 报道亚马逊在 AI 故障后召开工程会议，旨在提升系统可靠性、事件响应与 AI 服务的事后分析与改进。

items.title_en: Restoring a Sun SPARCstation IPX part 1: PSU and NVRAM (2020)
items.title_zh: 修复 Sun SPARCstation IPX 第1部分：电源与 NVRAM
items.summary_en: This restoration kicks off with the power supply and NVRAM, outlining steps to revive vintage SPARC hardware. The project documents teardown, testing, and substitutions, offering practical notes for retro enthusiasts and hardware preservers.
items.summary_zh: 本次修复从电源与 NVRAM 入手，介绍复兴遗留 SPARCStation IPX 的具体步骤。内容包括拆解、测试与安全注意事项，面向复古科技爱好者。

items.title_en: Notes on Baking at the South Pole
items.title_zh: 世界上最美的冷冻库：南极烘焙笔记
items.summary_en: A New Yorker essay pairs culinary life with life at the South Pole, using a remarkable freezer as a lens on isolation, science, and small daily rituals in extreme environments. The piece blends science and domestic comfort to illuminate life at a polar outpost.
items.summary_zh: 《纽约客》的一篇随笔把南极的科学工作与日常生活联系起来，以一台美丽的冷冻库为切入点，展现极地环境中的孤独、研究与小小日常仪式。文章将科学与家庭舒适感巧妙融合。

items.title_en: Algebraic topology: knots links and braids
items.title_zh: 代数拓扑：结、链接与 braids
items.summary_en: A resource on knots, links, and braids within algebraic topology, useful for students and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 介绍代数拓扑中的结、链接与 braids 的入门与进阶内容，适合学生与研究者。

items.title_en: Durdraw – ANSI art editor for Unix-like systems
items.title_zh: Durdraw：面向类 Unix 系统的 ANSI 艺术编辑器
items.summary_en: Durdraw is an ANSI art editor for Unix-like systems, enabling artists to craft retro graphics with terminal-first tooling and live previews. It lowers barriers to creation for console-centric workflows.
items.summary_zh: Durdraw 是一个面向 Unix 类系统的 ANSI 艺术编辑器，支持在终端环境中创作并提供实时预览，降低了控制台工作流的门槛。

items.title_en: Drosophila Fly Brain Emulation
items.title_zh: 果蝇大脑仿真
items.summary_en: Researchers share progress on emulating the Drosophila brain, a stepping stone toward modeling neural circuits and understanding general principles of brain function. The work blends biology and machine learning to build interpretable models.
items.summary_zh: 研究者分享果蝇大脑仿真的进展，这被视为建立神经回路模型、理解大脑工作原理的重要一步。该工作将生物学与机器学习结合，旨在构建可解释的模型。

items.title_en: Flash media longevity testing – 6 years later
items.title_zh: Flash 存储寿命测试：六年后
items.summary_en: Six-year follow-up on flash longevity revisits wear, retention, and practical implications for backups and archival storage. The findings help assess long-term risk for hobbyists and data centers alike.
items.summary_zh: 六年后对闪存寿命的回顾重新审视了磨损、数据保留与对备份及存档存储的实际影响。

items.title_en: Optimizing Top K in Postgres
items.title_zh: 在 PostgreSQL 中优化 Top-K
items.summary_en: Discusses methods to optimize top-k queries in PostgreSQL, highlighting when to push limits into index usage, partial sorts, and avoiding expensive full sorts. The takeaway is that choosing the right plan based on data distribution and query pattern is crucial.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 PostgreSQL 中 Top-K 查询的优化方法，强调在索引、部分排序与避免全量排序中的权衡。核心要点是要根据数据分布与查询模式选择合适的执行计划。

items.title_en: Claude Code, Claude Cowork and Codex #5
items.title_zh: Claude Code、Claude Cowork 与 Codex 第5期
items.summary_en: Reviews the latest in Claude's coding-focused tools: Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex #5. It weighs how well Claude supports coding workflows, collaboration, and how it stacks up against other AI coding assistants in real-world dev scenarios.
items.summary_zh: 评测 Claude 的编码相关工具：Claude Code、Claude Cowork 与 Codex 第5期。分析在实际开发流程中的协作与编码能力，以及与市场上其他 AI 编码助手相比的优劣与取舍。

items.title_en: Show HN: I Was Here – Draw on street view, others can find your drawings
items.title_zh: Show HN：I Was Here——在街景上绘画，别人可以定位你的绘画
items.summary_en: Describes a project that lets people draw on street-view locations, with others able to locate your drawings on the map. Highlights the privacy and geolocation implications of crowd-sourced art over real-world spaces.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个允许在街景位置绘画的项目，其他人可以通过地图定位到你的绘画位置。凸显了众包艺术在现实空间中的隐私和地理定位影响。

items.title_en: Gabibi is a tool for intentionally degrading images (in Japanese)
items.title_zh: Gabibi：有意降低图像质量的工具（日文）
items.summary_en: Gabibi is a tool designed to degrade images on purpose, likely to test model robustness, data augmentation, or perceptual studies. The post provides usage notes and links, with a focus on deliberate degradation workflows.
items.summary_zh: Gabibi 是一个有意降级图像质量的工具，通常用于测试模型鲁棒性、数据增强或感知研究。文章介绍了用法要点与应用场景，聚焦于有目的的降级工作流。

items.title_en: On Thinking Machines
items.title_zh: 关于会思考的机器
items.summary_en: On Thinking Machines discusses whether machines can truly think, exploring philosophical and technical dimensions of AI, cognition, and intelligence, and surveying limits and emergent properties of modern AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 《关于会思考的机器》探讨机器是否真的会思考，涵盖人工智能、认知与智能的哲学与技术维度，审视现代 AI 系统的边界与涌现特性。

items.title_en: macOS Tahoe windows have different corner radiuses
items.title_zh: macOS Tahoe 的窗口圆角半径不一致
items.summary_en: Points out inconsistent window corner radii in macOS Tahoe, underscoring subtle UI inconsistencies that affect perceived polish. Suggests developers consider visual coherence and potential fixes or OS updates.
items.summary_zh: 指出 macOS Tahoe 的窗口圆角半径不统一，凸显影响界面美观的细微 UI 不一致。提示开发者关注视觉连贯性，并关注系统更新带来的修复。

items.title_en: Show HN: Remotely use my guitar tuner
items.title_zh: Show HN：远程使用我的吉他调音器
items.summary_en: Show HN showcases a project that lets the author use their guitar tuner remotely, illustrating practical ideas for remote audio tools and real-time signal processing. The project demonstrates how lightweight streaming and client-server integration can let you calibrate instruments from anywhere without bulky hardware.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个能实现远程调音吉他调音器的项目，凸显了远程音频工具与实时信号处理的应用潜力。该方案通过轻量级流传输和前后端协作，使用户在任何地点都能使用调音功能，无需笨重设备。

items.title_en: The Gervais Principle, or the Office According to "The Office" (2009)
items.title_zh: 盖维斯原则，或《办公室》中的职场观
items.summary_en: The Gervais Principle analyzes The Office as a lens on corporate hierarchies, arguing that managers chase status while workers use wit to survive; a bleak, funny blueprint for corporate life that tech readers may recognize in startup culture.
items.summary_zh: 盖维斯原则以《办公室》为透镜，揭示职场等级如何以地位为核心运作、经理人维护权力而非追求效率，普通员工则通过机智对抗生存。这一视角为读者提供对企业文化的辛辣解读，和对现代职场的共鸣。

items.title_en: The window chrome of our discontent
items.title_zh: 浏览器窗口装饰的失望
items.summary_en: This piece critiques browser window chrome and argues for leaner, more consistent UI to improve focus and perceived performance. It suggests reducing chrome and standardizing UI patterns to let content shine.
items.summary_zh: 本文批评浏览器窗口装饰的设计，主张以更简洁、统一的 UI 提升聚焦感与性能感。建议减少装饰、统一 UI 模式，让内容成为焦点。

items.title_en: Lotus 1-2-3 on the PC with DOS
items.title_zh: DOS 上的 Lotus 1-2-3
items.summary_en: Retrospective look at Lotus 1-2-3 running on DOS-era PCs, discussing portability, performance, and the software's influence on the spreadsheet and PC software market.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 DOS 时代的 PC 上运行的 Lotus 1-2-3，探讨兼容性与性能，以及这款表格软件对电子表格与 PC 软件生态的深远影响。

items.title_en: Graphing how the 10k* most common English words define each other
items.title_zh: 前10,000个最常用英语单词互相定义的关系图
items.summary_en: A visualization exploring how the most common English words relate to each other via co-definition or contextual links, offering insights for NLP and lexical studies.
items.summary_zh: 通过图形展示前万词最常用英语单词之间的相互定义和上下文关系，为自然语言处理与词汇研究提供洞见。

items.title_en: Unlocking Python's Cores:Energy Implications of Removing the GIL
items.title_zh: 解锁 Python 核心：移除 GIL 的能耗影响
items.summary_en: New analysis examines the energy impact of removing CPython's GIL. While CPU-bound workloads could see speedups, higher per-thread overhead and memory use may offset gains, making energy efficiency a nuanced trade-off in Python's future design.
items.summary_zh: 新研究分析了移除 CPython GIL 的能源影响。CPU 密集型工作负载可能获得提速，但更高的线程开销和内存使用也可能抵消部分收益，意味着能效需要在 Python 的未来设计中权衡。

items.title_en: Darkrealms BBS
items.title_zh: Darkrealms BBS：一款现代复古风格的BBS
items.summary_en: A modern take on the classic bulletin board system, Darkrealms BBS blends retro aesthetics with contemporary web tech and community features. It shows continued interest in retro computing and decentralized messaging, plus how to modernize an old UI/UX for today's devices.
items.summary_zh: Darkrealms BBS 将经典的 BBS 以现代方式呈现，融合复古美学、当代网页技术与社区功能。它体现了对复古计算和去中心化沟通的持续热情，以及如何将旧式界面现代化以适配当今设备。

items.title_en: Velxio, Arduino Emulator
items.title_zh: Velxio：Arduino 仿真器
items.summary_en: Velxio provides an Arduino emulator letting developers run sketches on a host computer, with familiar GPIO and serial I/O emulation. It accelerates prototyping and education by removing hardware bottlenecks.
items.summary_zh: Velxio 提供一个 Arduino 仿真器，允许在主机上运行草图并模拟常用 GPIO 与串口输入输出，提升原型设计与教育效率。

items.title_en: Rethinking Syntax: Binding by Adjacency
items.title_zh: 重新思考语法：按相邻绑定
items.summary_en: A proposal to bind symbols by their adjacency in code rather than strict lexical or lexical scope. The approach could simplify DSL design, improve composability, and affect compiler and analyzer implementations.
items.summary_zh: 提出按代码临近性来绑定标识符，而非按严格作用域。此思路或简化领域特定语言的设计、提升模块化，并影响编译器与静态分析实现。

items.title_en: TCXO Failure Analysis
items.title_zh: TCXO 故障分析
items.summary_en: The post analyzes failures in temperature-compensated crystal oscillators, tracing root causes such as aging, supply voltage, and environmental conditions. It offers practical test methods and mitigation strategies for robust timing in electronics.
items.summary_zh: 文章通过对 TCXO 的故障案例分析，归因于老化、供电波动、温度等因素，提出诊断和缓解策略，以提高电子设备的时序鲁棒性。

items.title_en: Practical Guide to Bare Metal C++
items.title_zh: Bare Metal C++ 实用指南
items.summary_en: A practical guide to writing C++ for bare-metal environments, covering memory layout, interrupts, and OO patterns without an OS. It emphasizes discipline in resource management and the realities of cross-compilation, essential for embedded and systems programming.
items.summary_zh: 本指南聚焦裸机环境下的 C++ 编程，讲解在无操作系统的情况下如何使用抽象类、对象模型以及低层次细节如启动序列、内存布局和中断处理，帮助嵌入和系统编程实践。

items.title_en: The hidden compile-time cost of C++26 reflection
items.title_zh: C++26 反射的隐藏编译期成本
items.summary_en: C++26 reflection adds powerful metaprogramming capabilities but imposes heavier compile-time costs; the post analyzes how templates and reflection expansion impact build times and developer feedback loops, with strategies to manage the cost.
items.summary_zh: C++26 反射带来强大的元编程能力，但也增加了较高的编译时成本。文章分析模板展开与反射扩展如何影响构建时间，并给出控制成本的策略。

items.title_en: Caxlsx: Ruby gem for xlsx generation with charts, images, schema validation
items.title_zh: Caxlsx：Ruby xlsx 生成库，支持图表、图片与模式校验
items.summary_en: Caxlsx makes it straightforward to generate Excel files with charts, images, and schema validation from Ruby apps. The project reduces boilerplate for reporting pipelines and ensures data integrity with built-in schema support.
items.summary_zh: Caxlsx 提供在 Ruby 应用中生成带有图表、图片以及模式验证的 Excel 文件的高层接口，极大简化报表工作流并通过模式支持确保数据完整性。

items.title_en: A useless infinite scroll experiment
items.title_zh: 一个无用的无限滚动实验
items.summary_en: An infinite-scroll experiment that ends up being more a UX joke than a useful feature, inviting reflection on when endless scrolling actually serves users.
items.summary_zh: 一个看似无用的无限滚动实验，更多像是对用户体验的玩笑，引发对无限滚动何时对用户有价值的思考。

items.title_en: RVA23 Ends Speculation's Monopoly in RISC-V CPUs
items.title_zh: RVA23 结束了 RISC-V CPU 的垄断猜测
items.summary_en: Reports on RVA23 conference outcomes showing more vendors shipping competitive RISC-V cores, reducing vendor lock-in and expanding open ISA momentum. This could accelerate ecosystem competition, tooling, and energy efficiency options.
items.summary_zh: 报道 RVA23 会议的结果，显示更多厂商在推出竞争力的 RISC-V 核心，削弱垄断猜测，推动开放指令集生态的势头。这可能加速生态竞争、工具链发展与能效选项的提升。

items.title_en: A New Version of Our Oracle Solaris Environment for Developers
items.title_zh: 用于开发者的 Oracle Solaris 环境新版本
items.summary_en: Oracle updates its Solaris developer environment with refreshed toolchains, container support, and streamlined workflows for building and testing software on Solaris. The update aims to keep Solaris relevant for developers and enterprise workloads.
items.summary_zh: Oracle 发布了 Solaris 开发者环境的新版本，更新了工具链、容器能力和开发工作流，提升在 Solaris 平台上的开发与测试体验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hopalong Attractor. An old classic with a new perspective in 3D
items.title_zh: Show HN：Hopalong 吸引子——在 3D 中的新视角
items.summary_en: Presents a 3D visualization reinterpretation of the Hopalong Attractor, a classic chaotic system, offering a fresh perspective and interactive exploration.
items.summary_zh: 展示 Hopalong 吸引子在 3D 中的新视角的可视化实现，重新演绎这一定态混沌系统，提供交互探索体验。
